# Instructions File Review Checklist

## Structure

- STRUCT-01: YAML frontmatter present and valid
- STRUCT-02: Required fields (name, description, applyTo)
- STRUCT-03: File naming conventions
- STRUCT-04: Section organization

## Content Quality

- CONTENT-01: Clear purpose and scope
- CONTENT-02: Concrete examples provided
- CONTENT-03: Technical accuracy
- CONTENT-04: Completeness of requirements

## Usability

- USE-01: Instructions clarity
- USE-02: Actionable guidance
- USE-03: Avoiding ambiguous language
- USE-04: Template/example availability

## Consistency

- CONS-01: Terminology consistency
- CONS-02: Formatting consistency
- CONS-03: Cross-reference accuracy
- CONS-04: Integration with other instructions

## Requirements

- REQ-01: Tool compatibility documented
- REQ-02: Prerequisites specified
- REQ-03: Success criteria defined
- REQ-04: Error scenarios handled
